mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reliability_calc (owner_id, dataset, method, result) VALUES (#{ownerId}, #{dataset}, #{method}, #{result})
mapper.select: SELECT id, owner_id, dataset, method, result FROM reliability_calc WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, owner_id, dataset, method, result FROM reliability_calc WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
